scripts.ingest: docker compose --profile ingestion up --build --abort-on-container-exit; docker compose --profile ingestion down
scripts.build: pnpm -C lib exec tsc --build && pnpm -C backend exec tsc --build && pnpm -C frontend run build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C lib exec biome ci . && pnpm -C backend exec biome ci . && pnpm -C frontend exec biome ci .
scripts.format: pnpm -C lib exec biome check --write . && pnpm -C backend exec biome check --write . && pnpm -C frontend exec biome check --write .
